name: Bread & Butter The Filth 16mm Elongated
description: The Bread & Butter Filth 16mm Elongated is a thermoformed unibody paddle from the brand's signature high-spin line. The T700 raw carbon fiber face holds aggressive peel-ply texture for tournament-grade topspin, and the 16 mm high-density polypropylene core provides plush dwell time on resets without losing the trademark Filth pop on drives. The elongated 16.5 in profile extends reach for two-handed backhands and overheads, and the octagon handle with vibration-dampening wrap reduces transfer to the wrist on off-center hits. USAP approved.

specifications.face_material: T700 raw carbon fiber, thermoformed unibody

care_instructions: Wipe the raw carbon face with a microfiber after each session to preserve the peel-ply texture that drives spin. Skip abrasive cleaners and solvent-based wipes — they polish away the surface tooth. The thermoformed edge wall is impact-tolerant but not impact-proof; do not drop the paddle on hard courts. Store flat in a paddle cover; avoid hot vehicles.
